Description:
Want to try the GitHub Copilot CLI? It takes just seconds to get it running on your machine. You can install it globally using npm, or use package managers like Homebrew and Winget. Once installed, simply authenticate your GitHub account and you are ready to code.

Watch our full Copilot CLI for beginners series to see it in action: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BDxRhhs36ns&list=PL0lo9MOBetEHvO-spzKBAITkkTqv4RvNl

#GitHubCopilot #CopilotCLI #GitHub

Title: How to install GitHub Copilot CLI in seconds
